query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_documents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `uploadedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `label` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Document',
  `file_url` text NOT NULL,
  `file_key` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `file_name` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `file_size` int,
  `mime_type` varchar(100),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_documents_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `user_documents_uploadedBy_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`uploadedBy`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`)
);
